title: Mbembe Reforged
body:
A reforged version of Mbembe mod.

Mokele Mbembe

Tall, dinosaur-like reptile that rarely spawns in rivers.
- Only attacks drowned & players when provoked
- Giving it a Heart of the Sea makes it grant you Mokele's Blessing, allowing you to get better loot while fishing as well as deal more damage to entities in rivers.
- ~~Naming it "Lowtiergod" has interesting side effects~~(will in newer versions)

Dodos

Well known extinct birds that spawn commonly in Stone shores and Beaches
 
 - ~~Giving it a Glistering Melon gives a unique varient~~(If you've watched Ice age you will know)
- ~~Right clicking it with a Water bucket while it has the special varient will turn it back to normal~~(will in newer versions)

Requires Geckolib https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib
